commands.command:
from datetime import datetime
SetVar("log_type", "INFO")
SetVar("log_time", datetime.now().strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S"))
SetVar("log_message", "Validando el status de los directorios.")
SetVar("log_robot", "%robot_name%")

from pathlib import Path

input_path = Path(GetVar("input_report_path"))

pdf_files = [f for f in input_path.iterdir() if f.is_file() and f.suffix.lower() == ".pdf"]
SetVar("input_reports", ",".join(str(f) for f in pdf_files))

if len(pdf_files) == 0:
    SetVar("missing_inputs", "No se encontraron actas para leer")

elif len(pdf_files) > 1:
    SetVar("missing_inputs", "Se encontraron muchas actas, debe haber solo una")

from pathlib import Path

input_path = Path(GetVar("input_report_path"))

pdf_files = [f for f in input_path.iterdir() if f.is_file() and f.suffix.lower() == ".pdf"]

if len(pdf_files) == 0:
    SetVar("missing_inputs", "No se encontraron actas para leer")

elif len(pdf_files) > 1:
    SetVar("missing_inputs", "Se encontraron muchas actas, debe haber solo una")

commands.description: Check config/ directory (TODO: Check if its redundant)

children.command:
from datetime import datetime
import ast

missing_configs = GetVar("missing_configs")
missing_scripts = GetVar("missing_scripts")
missing_inputs = GetVar("missing_inputs")

missing_configs = ast.literal_eval(missing_configs) if missing_configs else []
missing_scripts = ast.literal_eval(missing_scripts) if missing_scripts else []
missing_inputs = ast.literal_eval(missing_inputs) if missing_inputs else []

SetVar("log_type", "CRITICO")
SetVar("log_time", datetime.now().strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S"))
SetVar("log_message", "Falló la arquitectura de los directorios y archivos en los chequeos iniciales.")
SetVar("log_robot", "%robot_name%")
SetVar("log_error", "%rocketbot_last_status%")
SetVar("log_img", "%robot_name%"+f"_{datetime.now().strftime('%d%m%Y%H%M%S')}")

mail_msg = (
    "Falló la arquitectura de los directorios en los chequeos iniciales.\n"
    f"Configs faltantes: {', '.join(missing_configs) if missing_configs else 'Ninguna'}\n"
    f"Scripts faltantes: {', '.join(missing_scripts) if missing_scripts else 'Ninguno'}\n"
    f"Inputs faltantes: {', '.join(missing_inputs) if missing_inputs else 'Ninguno'}"
)

SetVar("mail_subject_error_notification", "Error - %robot_name%")
SetVar("mail_body_error_notification", mail_msg)
